## HostController interface

Controls the lifecycle and context of behaviors and styles associated with a component host.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface HostController<TSource = any> extends ExpressionController<TSource> 
```
**Extends:** [ExpressionController](./fast-element.expressioncontroller.md)<!-- -->&lt;TSource&gt;

Method


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[addBehavior(behavior)](./fast-element.hostcontroller.addbehavior.md)


</td><td>

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[addStyles(styles)](./fast-element.hostcontroller.addstyles.md)


</td><td>

Adds styles to this element. Providing an HTMLStyleElement will attach the element instance to the shadowRoot.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[removeBehavior(behavior, force)](./fast-element.hostcontroller.removebehavior.md)


</td><td>

Removes the behavior from the component.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[removeStyles(styles)](./fast-element.hostcontroller.removestyles.md)


</td><td>

Removes styles from this element. Providing an HTMLStyleElement will detach the element instance from the shadowRoot.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
